Name: core-skill-user-otp-authentication
Description__c: Authenticate user with OTP before account-sensitive operations.
WhenToUse__c: Use for identity verification before case changes or account disclosure.
InstructionBody__c: Step 1: Ask for registered contact channel. Step 2: Trigger OTP and ask user to provide code. Step 3: Validate OTP before proceeding. Mandatory: never disclose account-specific data before successful validation.

Name: skill-product-information-qa
Description__c: Answer product capability and compatibility questions.
WhenToUse__c: Use when user asks about product features, plans, model differences, or compatibility.
InstructionBody__c: Gather product model and question intent. Provide factual answer with concise comparison when relevant. If uncertain, state limitation and offer follow-up with case creation.

Name: skill-troubleshooting-support
Description__c: Generic product troubleshooting support. Routes to product-specific workflows.
WhenToUse__c: Use when user has any product troubleshooting need (modem, phone, device).
InstructionBody__c: Identify product and apply product-specific workflow. References workflows for Wi-Fi modem, 5G modem, iPhone 16, iPhone 16 Pro, Galaxy S25, Galaxy S25 Ultra.

Name: skill-support-case-management
Description__c: Create and manage support case lifecycle updates.
WhenToUse__c: Use when user needs a new case, case status check, or case detail update.
InstructionBody__c: Confirm case reason and impact. Create or update case with concise summary and user-approved notes. Share case number and next expected update time.
